title: Ian’s CV
text:
Accounting Student, Brigham Young University - Idaho

you@byui.edu | LinkedIn



Pursuing a BS in Accounting at Brigham Young University - Idaho, graduating December 2026.


Tax return preparation, financial accounting, income taxation, data analytics, spreadsheet modeling



Communication skills, Organizational skills, Attention to detail
Technical Skills: CCH Axcess, Excel, Power BI, SQL, Python




December 2026 Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, ID

BS, Accounting
GPA: 3.96
Relevant coursework: financial accounting, managerial accounting, cost accounting, income taxation, business statistics, spreadsheet application




January 2026 - April 2026 Tax Intern, Eide Bailly LLP, Boise, ID

Prepared and reviewed nearly 100 partnership and individual tax returns using CCH Axcess, ensuring accuracy and compliance with federal and state filing requirements
Collaborated with a team of tax associates across multiple client engagements, coordinating workpapers and supporting documentation in CCH Axcess to meet filing deadlines
Adapted to a high-volume, deadline-driven environment during peak season, prioritizing client deliverables to ensure on-time filing

May 2025 - August 2025 Sales Representative, Fox Pest Control, Manchester, NH

Generated over $55,000 in service revenue by accurately managing more than 60 customer records and service agreements
Delivered consistent customer satisfaction by quickly adapting to new locations and demographics and maintaining high-quality interactions in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

January 2025 - April 2025 Sales Support Representative, Safestreets Security, Rexburg, ID

Performed timely credit checks on potential customers to ensure risk compliance
Acted as primary support contact for sales representatives, resolving issues related to scheduling, installation, and equipment orders

June 2022 - June 2024 Volunteer Representative, LDS Church, Eastern Visayas, Philippines

Acquired fluency in Cebuano and Waray Waray
Developed professional interpersonal skills by working with people from diverse backgrounds
Enlarged leadership abilities by training and leading 20 other representatives

June 2020 - May 2022 Shift Lead, Chick-fil-A, Ammon, ID

Demonstrated exceptional communication skills while interacting with customers and working with coworkers in a team environment
Directed and coached 20-30 team members throughout a shift to maintain high operational standards and service speed
Increased overall efficiency and sales by identifying and resolving bottlenecks during peak hours
